question: What design element makes the mirror in the bathroom unique? Select from the following options: (A) It has a rustic wooden frame. (B) It is a circular shape with a frame. (C) It features an intricate carving on the top. (D) It has LED lights embedded around the edges.
gold_answer: It has a rustic wooden frame
answer_choices: It has a rustic wooden frame
It is a circular shape with a frame
It features an intricate carving on the top
It has LED lights embedded around the edges
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
